nasb.text: And they lifted up their voices and wept again; and Orpah kissed her mother-in-law, but Ruth clung to her.

esv.text: Then they lifted up their voices and wept again. And Orpah kissed her mother-in-law, but Ruth clung to her.

cnv.text: 她們又放聲大哭。俄耳巴就和婆婆吻別，路得卻捨不得離開拿俄米。

ccb.text: 她们又放声大哭，俄珥巴就亲吻婆婆，向她道别。然而，路得却依依不舍，不肯离去。

csbs.text: 她们又放声大哭；娥珥巴吻别了她的婆婆，但路得却紧跟着娜娥米。
